bear.name: Bear
bear.content: Bears are opportunistic omnivors that eat fish and small mammals.

prey.name: Fish
prey.content: Fish are found in many bodies of water.

prey.name: Small Mammals
prey.content: Small mammals include mice and other rodents.

lynx.name: Lynx
lynx.content: The lynx is a solitary predator that uses stealth to sneak up on its prey.

prey.name: Deer
prey.content: Deer are hoofed ruminants (animals that graze and ferment plants).

wolf.name: Wolf
wolf.content: Wolves usually hunt in packs of 3-10. The allows them to take on animals larger than themselves.

prey.name: Deer
prey.content: Deer are hoofed ruminants (animals that graze and ferment plants).

prey.name: Moose
prey.content: Moose are the largest species in the deer family.
